name: Randomized TPE multi-omics healthy-adult trial
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled trial comparing TPE, TPE plus IVIG, and sham in adults over 50 with multi-omic aging-marker readouts.

trial_details.horizon_note: Publication results are already in the public evidence layer. ClinicalTrials.gov still listed the registry as active not recruiting with no registry-posted results and estimated study completion in August 2025 in the June 9, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The registry reconciliation keeps the favorable biomarker result tied to its no-registry-results trial-status boundary.
